findings.title: Privacy Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected privacy risk keywords indicating potential issues with PII handling or data collection gaps in the documentation.
assumptions: The keywords indicate a potential privacy concern that needs further investigation.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in the documentation.

recommendations: Conduct a thorough review of data handling practices to ensure compliance with privacy policies.

findings.title: Critical Push Notification Delivery Failure on Android 14
findings.description: The failure of push notifications on Android 14 devices poses a critical risk to user engagement and retention.
assumptions: This issue affects a significant portion of users and needs immediate resolution.

evidence.excerpt: Fix Silent Notification Failures on Android 14.

recommendations: Resolve the issue with push notifications on Android 14 devices immediately.

metadata.mitigation: Immediate resolution of push notification failures.

findings.title: Accessibility Concerns in Notification Center
findings.description: Users with disabilities are facing challenges navigating the notification center, particularly with color-only indicators, highlighting a need for improved accessibility features.
assumptions: Accessibility features are not fully compliant with WCAG standards.

evidence.excerpt: Users with disabilities are facing challenges navigating the notification center.

recommendations: Enhance the notification center to address accessibility concerns.

metadata.mitigation: Improve accessibility features in the notification center.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected compliance risk keywords indicating potential issues with GDPR, CCPA, or other regulatory requirements in the documentation.
assumptions: The keywords indicate a potential compliance concern that needs further investigation.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in the documentation.

recommendations: Conduct a compliance review to ensure adherence to GDPR, CCPA, and other regulations.

metadata.mitigation: Review compliance with GDPR and CCPA.

summary: Identified 4 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 privacy, 1 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 1 warnings).
